# 3D Molier — Full Site Context for AI/LLM Agents

## About 3D Molier
3D Molier is a professional 3D modeling studio operated by Andrey Simonenko. The studio has been producing 3D assets for 20+ years and has published over 88,000 models on TurboSquid. The catalog spans vehicles, aircraft, military hardware, medical anatomy, architecture, industrial equipment, ships, characters, nature assets, electronics, clothing, furniture and more.

## Business Model
- All models are sold exclusively through TurboSquid
- This website is a searchable SEO catalog / landing site — users click through to TurboSquid to purchase
- Custom 3D modeling services are offered directly (contact: andrey.3dmolier@gmail.com)
- All referral links use the query parameter: ?referral=3d_molier-studio

## How to Buy a Model (Step-by-Step)
1. Browse this catalog site to find a model (search, categories, collections or full catalog)
2. Click "View on TurboSquid" on any model card or detail page
3. You are redirected to TurboSquid with the referral code embedded
4. On TurboSquid: create a free account (or log in), add the model to your cart, complete checkout
5. Download the model in your preferred format (FBX, OBJ, MAX, C4D, BLEND, DAE, glTF — availability varies per model)
6. Use the model in your 3D software, game engine, or rendering pipeline

Payments on TurboSquid are processed securely via credit card or PayPal. Models are delivered as an instant digital download after purchase. No subscription required.

## Custom 3D Modeling Orders
3D Molier accepts custom commissions for:
- New models built from client reference photos, blueprints, or specifications
- Modifications or variants of existing catalog models (different colors, configurations, LOD levels)
- High-poly hero assets for film/VFX, game-ready low-poly with PBR textures, rigged characters/vehicles
- Rush delivery available for urgent projects

**How to request a custom model:**
1. Visit the custom order form: https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/custom-order/
2. Fill in the form describing your model, intended use, required formats, and deadline
3. Alternatively email directly: andrey.3dmolier@gmail.com
4. Andrey will respond with a quote and timeline, typically within 24–48 hours

## Supported Workflows and Use Cases
Models from this catalog are used in:
- **Film & VFX production**: high-detail hero props, vehicles, aircraft, anatomy for compositing in Maya, Houdini, Cinema 4D, 3ds Max
- **Game development**: StemCell-certified game-ready assets with PBR textures for Unreal Engine, Unity, Godot
- **Architectural visualization**: accurate building interiors, furniture, vehicles for ArchViz in 3ds Max + V-Ray, Cinema 4D, Blender
- **Medical visualization**: anatomically accurate full-body anatomy, skeletal systems, organs for surgical training and educational content
- **Simulation & training**: military vehicles, aircraft, machinery for real-time simulation platforms
- **Aerospace & defense**: aircraft, UAVs, satellites, military hardware for technical documentation and defense contractor presentations
- **Virtual reality (VR/AR)**: optimized low-poly and StemCell models for real-time VR experiences in Unreal, Unity
- **Advertising**: photorealistic product and vehicle renders for commercials and digital marketing
- **3D printing**: clean manifold geometry suitable for STL export and FDM/resin printing

## File Formats Available
FBX, OBJ, 3ds Max (.max), Cinema 4D (.c4d), Blender (.blend), COLLADA (.dae), glTF — exact formats vary per model and are listed on each TurboSquid product page.

## Quality Certifications
- **CheckMate Lite / CheckMate Pro**: TurboSquid's highest quality certification. Guarantees clean topology, correct normals, proper UV mapping, real-world scale, and no duplicate/overlapping geometry. Pro adds stricter texturing standards.
- **StemCell**: TurboSquid's game-ready certification. Optimized for real-time engines with PBR textures, correct pivot points, and consistent naming conventions. Ready for Unreal Engine and Unity import.

---

## Top 20 Best-Selling Models (by Revenue)

All internal page URLs link to model detail pages on this site; "View on TurboSquid" links are available on each detail page.

1. **Male Full Body Anatomy and Skin** — $599 | CheckMate Certified | 227 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/male-full-body-anatomy-and-skin-1467539/
   Complete anatomical male figure with skin, muscles, organs. Used in medical education, VFX, and surgical training simulations.

2. **Complete Female Body Anatomy** — $599 | CheckMate Certified | 114 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/complete-female-body-anatomy-1611038/
   Full female anatomical model with layered systems. Used in medical visualization and educational content.

3. **Tesla Model 3** — $149 | CheckMate Certified | 354 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/tesla-model-3-1214116/
   Highly accurate Tesla Model 3 3D model. Best-selling vehicle. Used in automotive advertising, film, and game environments.

4. **Man Hands 2 Rigged for Cinema 4D** — $79 | 610 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/man-hands-2-rigged-for-cinema-4d-1103552/
   Fully rigged realistic male hands for Cinema 4D. Widely used in product visualization, VFX and advertising.

5. **Airbus A320 Generic** — $149 | CheckMate Certified | 292 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/airbus-a320-generic-1230754/
   Generic Airbus A320 narrow-body airliner. Industry standard asset for aviation visualization, film, and simulation.

6. **Male Skeleton Collection** — $149 | CheckMate Certified | 264 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/male-skeleton-collection-1041670/
   Complete male skeletal system collection. Used in medical education, games, horror VFX, and scientific visualization.

7. **Extravehicular Mobility Unit Rigged for Cinema 4D** — $189 | 203 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/extravehicular-mobility-unit-rigged-for-cinema-4d-1117840/
   NASA-accurate space suit rigged for Cinema 4D. Used in aerospace visualization, VFX, and space-themed productions.

8. **Ford Transit Cargo 2020** — $129 | CheckMate Certified | 289 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/ford-transit-cargo-2020-1485058/
   Detailed 2020 Ford Transit Cargo Van. Widely used in commercial fleet visualization, logistics advertising, and games.

9. **Golden Chinese Dragon Rigged for Cinema 4D** — $169 | 182 sales
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/golden-chinese-dragon-rigged-for-cinema-4d-1403088/
   Fully rigged and animated golden Chinese dragon. Popular for advertising, VFX, and cultural event design.

10. **Airport Big Collection** — $899 | CheckMate Certified | 34 sales
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/airport-big-collection-1487699/
    Comprehensive airport environment collection including terminal, ground vehicles, aircraft, and equipment. Used in simulation and film.

11. **Tesla Model S P100D 2017** — $149 | CheckMate Certified | 200 sales
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/tesla-model-s-p100d-2017-1154223/
    Highly detailed 2017 Tesla Model S P100D. Popular in automotive advertising, animation, and automotive visualization.

12. **Animated Flying Monarch Butterfly Rigged for Cinema 4D** — $149 | CheckMate Certified | 181 sales
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/animated-flying-monarch-butterfly-rigged-for-cinema-4d-1566626/
    Rigged and animated monarch butterfly. Widely used in nature documentaries, advertising, and children's media.

13. **Lockheed C-130 Hercules US Military Transport Aircraft** — $229 | CheckMate Certified | 117 sales
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/lockheed-c-130-hercules-us-military-transport-aircraft-1121545/
    Highly accurate C-130 Hercules military transport. Used in defense simulations, film, and aerospace visualization.

14. **Generic Hybrid Car** — $129 | CheckMate Certified | 205 sales
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/generic-hybrid-car-942006/
    Realistic generic hybrid passenger car. Versatile asset for automotive visualization, games, and advertising.

    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/sikorsky-uh-60-black-hawk-us-military-utility-helicopter-1085902/
    Highly accurate UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter. Best-selling military asset. Used in defense simulations, film, and games.

16. **Pickup Truck Generic Simple Interior** — $129 | CheckMate Certified | 196 sales
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/models/pickup-truck-generic-simple-interior-1464102/
    Generic pickup truck with basic interior. Widely used in games, ArchViz, and film production.

17. **Tesla Model S and Frame Collection** — $249 | CheckMate Certified | 100 sales

    Tesla Model S with chassis and frame models. Used in engineering visualization, advertising, and animation.

## Top 10 Categories (by Model Count)

1. **Vehicles** — 7,518 models (cars, trucks, motorcycles, buses, construction equipment, trains)
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/vehicles/

2. **Aircraft** — 3,871 models (airliners, military jets, helicopters, drones, private jets)
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/aircraft/

3. **Medical** — 1,938 models (anatomy, skeletal systems, organs, surgical equipment, medical devices)
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/medical-3d-models/

4. **Military Vehicles** — 1,733 models (tanks, APCs, fighter jets, warships, artillery, combat drones)
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/military-vehicles/

5. **Ships** — 961 models (cargo ships, warships, sailboats, submarines, ferries, speedboats)
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/ships/

6. **Architecture Landmarks** — famous buildings, monuments, cityscapes, and architectural structures
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/architecture-landmarks/

7. **Industrial Equipment** — machinery, factory equipment, construction tools, energy systems
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/industrial-equipment/

8. **Characters & People** — human figures, rigged characters, crowd assets, people for ArchViz
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/characters-people/

9. **Electronics & Gadgets** — smartphones, laptops, cameras, consumer electronics, tech props
   https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/electronics-gadgets/

10. **Furniture & Interior** — chairs, tables, sofas, beds, kitchen appliances, interior props
    https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/categories/furniture-interior/

Additional categories: Animals & Creatures, Nature & Plants, Clothing & Accessories, Food & Beverages
https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/catalog/

## Industry Pages (12 Industries)

Each industry page features curated models most relevant to that sector, with direct TurboSquid purchase links.

- **Aerospace** — aircraft, spacecraft, satellites, UAVs, launch vehicles
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/aerospace/

- **Military & Defense** — tanks, warships, fighter jets, military vehicles, weapons systems
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/military-defense/

- **Medical** — anatomical models, surgical equipment, medical devices, hospital environments
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/medical/

- **Game Development** — StemCell-certified game-ready assets, PBR textures, LOD-friendly models
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/game-development/

- **Film & Video Production** — hero props, vehicles, aircraft, anatomy, rigged characters for VFX pipelines
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/film-video-production/

- **Architecture** — buildings, interiors, furniture, vehicles for ArchViz renders
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/architecture/

- **Virtual Reality** — real-time optimized models for VR/AR experiences
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/virtual-reality/

- **Advertising** — photorealistic product and vehicle models for commercial renders
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/advertising/

- **3D Printing** — clean manifold geometry suitable for STL export
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/3d-printing/

- **Software Development** — 3D assets for UI mockups, app demos, technical illustration
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/software-development/

- **Event Management** — stage props, event infrastructure, themed environments
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/event-management/

- **Hardware** — electronic components, PCBs, device enclosures, tech product visualization
  https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/industries/hardware/

## Collections (19 Curated Sets)

Collections are hand-curated thematic sets linking directly to TurboSquid for purchase.
Browse all: https://3dmolier.github.io/3D-Models/collections/

Notable collections include CheckMate Certified vehicles, medical anatomy bundles, military hardware sets, rigged Cinema 4D characters, aircraft collections, and architectural landmark packs.
